2280720.name: Mellow Island Mess
2280720.description:
Mellow Island Mess is a short 2.5D retro-styled adventure game - jump, swim, and glide your way around the world to put a stop to the slime that's spreading across the land.

Relaxed platforming with branching paths, lots of characters to meet and over 30 quests to complete

🐨 New Friends

From moles to foxes, parrots to pigs, squirrels to turtles, there's many animals to meet and help!

📜 Complete Quests

Rescue a lost climber ⛰️, deliver a love letter 💌, calm an eel 🐍, collect bat poop 💩, conduct a toad choir 🎵, find the best sandwich filling 🥪, with more than 30 quests!

🐸 Learn Abilities

Explore new areas by learning new skills, like how to glide from some tree frogs or how to jump extra high by a kangaroo!
